# Open Design Root Setup For AdwenTech

## Summary
- Install `/home/jeffery/open-design` with local `pnpm` via Corepack, using the repo-pinned `pnpm@10.33.2`.
- Set up a reusable launcher at `/home/jeffery/bin/open-design-dev`, already on PATH, so Cursor or Claude Code terminals can start Open Design from anywhere.
- Keep AdwenTech as the priority workflow without letting Open Design directly edit the live storefront source.
- Use Claude Code as the preferred Open Design agent because `claude` and `codex` are installed, but `cursor-agent` is not currently on PATH.

## Key Changes
- Run install from `/home/jeffery/open-design`:
  - `corepack pnpm install`
  - let repo `postinstall` build required internal packages and verify `better-sqlite3`.
- Add launcher:
  -
